narrative:
Bexley 3-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,011 registered voters, with 46.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 38.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 23.6 percentage points.
